tasks.title: Add structured request-id logging middleware
tasks.prompt: Add request-id middleware to the existing HTTP server and thread the request id into structured logs without breaking current handlers.
acceptance_criteria: request id is attached to incoming requests
logs include the request id
existing tests still pass

tasks.title: Add explicit retry telemetry to an async worker
tasks.prompt: Extend an existing TypeScript worker flow to emit retry telemetry without regressing current behavior.
tasks.verification_command: npx pnpm -C packages/vitest build && npx pnpm -C test/cli exec vitest --run test/worker-retry-telemetry.test.ts
acceptance_criteria: retry telemetry is emitted on retry paths
non-retry paths stay unchanged
tests cover the new behavior

tasks.title: Add graceful shutdown logging to worker service
tasks.prompt: Extend an existing Go worker service so graceful shutdown emits structured progress logging and does not regress existing worker behavior.
acceptance_criteria: shutdown path emits structured log markers
existing worker/service behavior remains intact
tests verify the new shutdown behavior

tasks.title: Add explicit cancellation tracing to async tasks
tasks.prompt: Extend an existing TypeScript async task flow to emit explicit cancellation tracing without changing success-path semantics.
acceptance_criteria: cancellation path emits trace markers
success path stays behaviorally unchanged
tests verify cancellation handling

tasks.title: Fix stale timeout propagation in CLI path
tasks.prompt: Identify and fix a timeout propagation bug in an existing Go CLI/runtime path, then verify the regression with tests.
acceptance_criteria: root cause is identified
regression test is added or updated
fix passes package tests

tasks.title: Fix a flaky watcher regression
tasks.prompt: Find and fix a flaky file-watcher regression in an existing TypeScript project and verify the fix with targeted tests.
acceptance_criteria: root cause is explained
targeted regression coverage exists
the fix is validated by tests

tasks.title: Fix configuration reload regression
tasks.prompt: Identify and fix a configuration reload regression in a Go service and verify the fix with targeted regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: root cause is identified
regression test captures the bad behavior
reloaded configuration behaves correctly after the fix

tasks.title: Support datetime approx comparisons
tasks.prompt: Add datetime and timedelta support to pytest.approx with explicit timedelta tolerance, while rejecting unsupported datetime relative tolerance and nan_ok behavior.
acceptance_criteria: datetime and timedelta approx comparisons work with explicit timedelta tolerance
unsupported datetime relative tolerance and nan_ok combinations raise clear TypeError
focused approx tests cover success, failure, and error-message behavior

tasks.title: Preserve command error context
tasks.prompt: Fix a command or flag error propagation edge case so caller-visible errors preserve useful context without changing successful command execution.
acceptance_criteria: the error propagation bug is covered by a regression test
caller-visible error context is preserved
successful command behavior remains unchanged

tasks.title: Stabilize watcher rename/remove sequencing
tasks.prompt: Fix a watcher edge case around rename or remove sequencing and verify it with deterministic regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: the event sequence regression is captured by tests
the fix avoids broad timing assumptions
normal watcher behavior remains intact

tasks.title: Honor context cancellation in query path
tasks.prompt: Extend a bounded query path so context cancellation is observable and handled cleanly while preserving successful query behavior.
acceptance_criteria: cancellation behavior is covered by a focused test
successful query behavior is preserved
the change avoids unrelated ORM behavior churn

tasks.title: Preserve deterministic YAML transformer behavior
tasks.prompt: Add or fix a deterministic transformer or configuration behavior with fixture coverage while avoiding broad output churn.
acceptance_criteria: the transformer or configuration behavior is covered by a fixture test
the verification command is module-scoped
unrelated YAML output remains unchanged

tasks.title: Fix abort timeout behavior
tasks.prompt: Fix an abort or timeout edge behavior in the request flow and cover it with a targeted regression test.
acceptance_criteria: abort or timeout behavior is deterministic
a targeted regression test covers the edge case
normal request behavior remains unchanged

tasks.title: Handle mounted app router sentinel
tasks.prompt: Fix Express mounted-app next('router') propagation so the parent router continues to the next matching middleware without treating the sentinel as a real error.
acceptance_criteria: mounted-app next('router') behavior is covered by a regression test
real mounted-app errors still propagate as errors
normal handler paths remain unchanged

tasks.title: Extend lint rule fixture coverage
tasks.prompt: Extend a lint rule or fixer path with focused fixture coverage while avoiding unrelated rule or formatting churn.
acceptance_criteria: focused fixtures cover the new rule or fixer behavior
unrelated lint rules remain unchanged
existing CLI test behavior is preserved

tasks.title: Fix client abort handling edge case
tasks.prompt: Fix an abort or cancellation edge behavior in client request handling and verify the behavior with a focused test.
acceptance_criteria: abort or cancellation behavior is covered by a regression test
successful request behavior remains unchanged
the verification target stays focused

tasks.title: Fix command escaping in action toolkit output
tasks.prompt: Fix a command escaping or annotation formatting edge behavior while preserving existing action-toolkit output conventions.
acceptance_criteria: escaped command or annotation behavior is covered by tests
existing output format is preserved
the change avoids unrelated package churn

tasks.title: Fix formatter regression fixture
tasks.prompt: Fix a formatter regression with focused fixture coverage while avoiding unrelated snapshot or formatting churn.
acceptance_criteria: the formatter regression is covered by a focused fixture
unrelated snapshots are not rewritten
existing formatter tests continue to pass

tasks.title: Fix release-tooling configuration edge case
tasks.prompt: Fix a release-tooling configuration edge case with focused tests while preserving existing release behavior.
tasks.verification_command: npm run test:unit -- test/get-release-to-add.test.js && npm run test:integration
acceptance_criteria: the configuration edge case is covered by tests
existing release behavior remains unchanged
the fix does not require external release credentials

tasks.title: Fix CLI option parsing edge case
tasks.prompt: Fix a CLI option parsing edge case and verify it with targeted tests without changing normal command parsing behavior.
acceptance_criteria: the parsing edge case is covered by a focused test
normal command parsing remains unchanged
help or usage output is not churned unnecessarily

tasks.title: Preserve state-tooling API compatibility
tasks.prompt: Extend a state-tooling helper behavior while preserving public API compatibility and focused test coverage.
acceptance_criteria: the helper behavior is covered by focused tests
public API compatibility is preserved
existing state-tooling tests continue to pass

tasks.prompt: Fix a request mocking handler edge case and verify the fix with focused tests across the relevant runtime path.
acceptance_criteria: the handler edge case is covered by a regression test
existing request mocking semantics remain unchanged

tasks.prompt: Fix a session or request option propagation edge case and verify it with focused regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: the option propagation edge case is covered by tests
existing request behavior remains unchanged

tasks.title: Fix CLI parsing help output edge case
tasks.prompt: Fix a CLI parsing or help-output edge case and verify it with a focused pytest regression.
acceptance_criteria: the parser or help-output edge case is covered by tests

tasks.title: Preserve request context behavior

acceptance_criteria: request or app context behavior is covered by a focused test
